query:
SELECT 
  u.name,
  u.email,
  edp.enabled,
  edp.frequency,
  edp.includeHotOnly,
  edp.lastSentAt
FROM emailDigestPrefs edp
JOIN users u ON u.id = edp.userId
ORDER BY u.name;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user HWMKhVWm4R1gayY.38561a93bc5c --database 3SMu786VMCWdCnmNSx6pxw --execute 
SELECT 
  u.name,
  u.email,
  edp.enabled,
  edp.frequency,
  edp.includeHotOnly,
  edp.lastSentAt
FROM emailDigestPrefs edp
JOIN users u ON u.id = edp.userId
ORDER BY u.name;
